category_sources: source_facts.description says Unbound is a validating, recursive, caching DNS resolver; official NLnet Labs documentation identifies Unbound documentation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is unbound; official NLnet Labs and GitHub repository pages use the product name Unbound.
docs_sources: Official NLnet Labs documentation page points to unbound.docs.nlnetlabs.nl as the main Unbound user documentation and also hosts generated source documentation.
repo_sources: Official NLnet Labs download page links to the GitHub repository; GitHub repository is under the NLnetLabs organization and describes Unbound as a validating recursive caching DNS resolver.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official documentation describe Unbound as a validating recursive caching DNS resolver.
